test.command: bun run ci:vitest && bun run ci:pytest

appliedUpdates.description: Added environment guidance for same-SHA remote check-run evidence collection (target SHA must be remotely reachable, using temporary branch when needed) and Droid-Shield-safe redaction handling for timestamp-like artifact fields.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Codify an explicit same-SHA remote-proof retrieval sequence for historical SHAs: ensure target SHA is reachable on a remote ref (temporary evidence branch if needed), wait for required checks, then capture immutable check-run IDs/URLs for that exact SHA before writing evidence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review confidence-evidence-reanchor-to-fix-sha observed ad-hoc temporary-branch handling to make parity-fix SHA queryable for check-runs API; procedure is not explicit in current skill guidance.
